title: scorzonera austriaca var. itermedia
intro: Scorzonera austriaca var. itermedia, also known as Autumn Savory, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Scorzonera austriaca var. itermedia include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health concerns. Scorzonera austriaca var. itermedia can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
